target.title: test(param-key): add unit tests for parameter key normalization
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The `param-key.ts` module provides parameter key normalization utilities that convert camelCase keys to snake_case and handle parameter lookup with fallback. However, this module lacked unit tests to verify the normalization logic, which could lead to regressions when the function is modified.

## Why This Change Was Made

Add unit tests for `resolveSnakeCaseParamKey` and `readSnakeCaseParamRaw` functions to verify camelCase to snake_case conversion and parameter lookup behavior. This improves test coverage and prevents regressions.

Focused tests cover exact key matching, snake case fallback, multiple uppercase letters, numbers in keys, whitespace preservation, null/undefined values, and object/array values.

## User Impact

Parameter key normalization now has comprehensive test coverage, reducing the risk of regressions when the function is modified.

## Evidence

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows the `param-key.ts` module exists and provides parameter key normalization utilities, but lacks unit tests.

Direct behavior probe:

```text
$ node --import tsx -e "import('./src/param-key.js').then(({ resolveSnakeCaseParamKey }) => console.log(JSON.stringify([{ desc: 'Exact key matching', params: { myKey: 'value' }, key: 'myKey', expected: 'myKey', result: resolveSnakeCaseParamKey({ myKey: 'value' }, 'myKey') }, { desc: 'Snake case fallback', params: { my_key: 'value' }, key: 'myKey', expected: 'my_key', result: resolveSnakeCaseParamKey({ my_key: 'value' }, 'myKey') }, { desc: 'Multiple uppercase letters', params: { my_xml_parser: 'value' }, key: 'myXMLParser', expected: 'my_xml_parser', result: resolveSnakeCaseParamKey({ my_xml_parser: 'value' }, 'myXMLParser') }], null, 2)))"
[
  {
    "desc": "Exact key matching",
    "params": {
      "myKey": "value"
    },
    "key": "myKey",
    "expected": "myKey",
    "result": "myKey"
  },
  {
    "desc": "Snake case fallback",
    "params": {
      "my_key": "value"
    },
    "key": "myKey",
    "expected": "my_key",
    "result": "my_key"
  },
  {
    "desc": "Multiple uppercase letters",
    "params": {
      "my_xml_parser": "value"
    },
    "key": "myXMLParser",
    "expected": "my_xml_parser",
    "result": "my_xml_parser"
  }
]
```

Targeted test:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/param-key.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 /home/0668001110/ZTEProject/openclaw-worktrees/pr-94335

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  15 passed (15)
   Start at  14:41:04
   Duration  1.23s (transform 549ms, setup 589ms, import 14ms, tests 150ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 12.68s
```

Formatting:

```text
$ npx oxfmt --check src/param-key.ts src/param-key.test.ts
Checking formatting...

All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 73ms on 2 files using 8 threads.
```

Whitespace:

```text
$ git diff --check
```

## AI-assisted

Prepared with Codex. I reviewed the change, understand the touched code path, and kept the PR focused on the bug described above.
